Artwork Gallery

Finished artwork from the Kids Colouring Contest, displayed for employee viewing and voting. Each entry shows the artist’s first name and age only.

← Back to the Contest

The gallery opens soon!

Finished artwork will be displayed here after the submission deadline. Check back for employee viewing and voting.

Submissions close July 29, 2026  ·  Employee voting July 30, 2026

How entries will be displayed

Sample entries shown below — each real entry will display the artwork with the artist’s first name and age only, exactly as on the consent form.

How voting will work: when voting opens on July 30, each entry’s button becomes Vote for Entry # — click it, your email opens pre-filled, just press Send. One vote per employee, per category.
